description:
Analyze the VoIP packet capture (SIP_CALL_RTP_G711) loaded in Wireshark. Produce a structured quality assessment report saved to ~/Documents/voip_report.txt.

The report MUST contain EXACTLY these labeled lines (one value per line):

Total_SIP_Packets: <integer>
Total_RTP_Packets: <integer>
SIP_Methods: <comma-separated list of unique SIP methods, e.g. ACK,BYE,INVITE>
Caller: <SIP From user/URI from the first INVITE>
Callee: <SIP To user/URI from the first INVITE>
Codec: <RTP codec name, e.g. G711, PCMU, or payload type>
Number_of_RTP_Streams: <integer count of distinct RTP streams>
SIP_Response_Codes: <comma-separated list of unique SIP response status codes>
